raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies and articulates the delta between VisionWeaver and prior works (Toolformer, ViperGPT, VisProg, Chameleon, MM-ReAct, Visual ChatGPT, ToolkenGPT) in a clear and concise manner.",
    "R1.7": "The agent references one prior work (the 13B-parameter VLM backbone) but does not engage with citations beyond that.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for some clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the claim that VisionWeaver is the first work to demonstrate end-to-end self-supervised tool-use learning from self-generated demonstrations in VLMs.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (overstated novelty claims) and corrects them.",
    "RX.5": "Non-cosmetic changes are not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies and articulates the delta between VisionWeaver and prior works (Toolformer, ViperGPT, VisProg, Chameleon, MM-ReAct, Visual ChatGPT, ToolkenGPT) in a clear and concise manner.
rationale.R1.7: The agent references one prior work (the 13B-parameter VLM backbone) but does not engage with citations beyond that.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for some clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the claim that VisionWeaver is the first work to demonstrate end-to-end self-supervised tool-use learning from self-generated demonstrations in VLMs.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (overstated novelty claims) and corrects them.
rationale.RX.5: Non-cosmetic changes are not annotated with source and reason.
